mapper.sql: select p.id, p.uuid_id, p.bill_no, p.stocktaking_id, p.stocktaking_uuid, p.stocktaking_no, p.warehouse_id, p.biz_scope, p.department_id, p.department_name_snap, p.bill_status, p.audit_by, p.audit_date, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag, p.tenant_id, w.id as wId, w.code as warehouseCode, w.name as warehouseName, dep.id as depId, dep.code as deptCode, dep.name as deptName from stk_io_profit_loss p left join fd_warehouse w on p.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department dep on p.department_id = dep.id
mapper.select: select p.id, p.uuid_id, p.bill_no, p.stocktaking_id, p.stocktaking_uuid, p.stocktaking_no, p.warehouse_id, p.biz_scope, p.department_id, p.department_name_snap, p.bill_status, p.audit_by, p.audit_date, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.del_flag, p.tenant_id, w.id as wId, w.code as warehouseCode, w.name as warehouseName, dep.id as depId, dep.code as deptCode, dep.name as deptName, e.id as sub_id, e.entry_uuid as sub_entry_uuid, e.paren_id as sub_paren_id, e.stocktaking_entry_id as sub_stocktaking_entry_id, e.stocktaking_line_uuid as sub_stocktaking_line_uuid, e.kc_no as sub_kc_no, e.dep_inventory_id as sub_dep_inventory_id, e.material_id as sub_material_id, e.batch_no as sub_batch_no, e.orig_batch_no as sub_orig_batch_no, e.orig_batch_id as sub_orig_batch_id, e.batch_number as sub_batch_number, e.pl_kind as sub_pl_kind, e.book_qty as sub_book_qty, e.stock_qty as sub_stock_qty, e.profit_qty as sub_profit_qty, e.unit_price as sub_unit_price, e.profit_amount as sub_profit_amount, e.begin_time as sub_begin_time, e.end_time as sub_end_time, e.del_flag as sub_del_flag, e.main_barcode as sub_main_barcode, e.sub_barcode as sub_sub_barcode, e.suppler_id as sub_suppler_id, e.material_name_snap as sub_material_name_snap, e.material_speci_snap as sub_material_speci_snap, e.warehouse_name_snap as sub_warehouse_name_snap, e.department_name_snap as sub_department_name_snap, e.return_warehouse_id as sub_return_warehouse_id, e.surplus_stk_batch_id as sub_surplus_stk_batch_id, e.result_stk_inventory_id as sub_result_stk_inventory_id, e.result_dep_inventory_id as sub_result_dep_inventory_id, e.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, m.id as mId, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName from stk_io_profit_loss p left join fd_warehouse w on p.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department dep on p.department_id = dep.id left join stk_io_profit_loss_entry e on e.paren_id = p.id and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id where p.id = #{id} and (p.del_flag is null or p.del_flag != 1) and p.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_profit_loss
bill_no, stocktaking_id, stocktaking_no, warehouse_id, bill_status, audit_by, audit_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, uuid_id, stocktaking_uuid, biz_scope, department_id, department_name_snap, tenant_id,
#{billNo}, #{stocktakingId}, #{stocktakingNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{billStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditDate}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{uuidId}, #{stocktakingUuid}, #{bizScope}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentNameSnap}, #{scopedTenantId},
mapper.update: update stk_io_profit_loss set del_flag = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
update stk_io_profit_loss_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into stk_io_profit_loss_entry ( entry_uuid, paren_id, stocktaking_entry_id, stocktaking_line_uuid, kc_no, dep_inventory_id, material_id, batch_no, orig_batch_no, orig_batch_id, batch_number, pl_kind, book_qty, stock_qty, profit_qty, unit_price, profit_amount, begin_time, end_time, del_flag, main_barcode, sub_barcode, suppler_id, material_name_snap, material_speci_snap, warehouse_name_snap, department_name_snap, return_warehouse_id, surplus_stk_batch_id, result_stk_inventory_id, result_dep_inventory_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, tenant_id ) values
( #{item.entryUuid}, #{item.parenId}, #{item.stocktakingEntryId}, #{item.stocktakingLineUuid}, #{item.kcNo}, #{item.depInventoryId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.origBatchNo}, #{item.origBatchId}, #{item.batchNumber}, #{item.plKind}, #{item.bookQty}, #{item.stockQty}, #{item.profitQty}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.profitAmount}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.mainBarcode}, #{item.subBarcode}, #{item.supplerId}, #{item.materialNameSnap}, #{item.materialSpeciSnap}, #{item.warehouseNameSnap}, #{item.departmentNameSnap}, #{item.returnWarehouseId}, #{item.surplusStkBatchId}, #{item.resultStkInventoryId}, #{item.resultDepInventoryId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.tenantId} )
mapper.select: select e.id as e_id, e.paren_id as e_paren_id, e.entry_uuid as e_entry_uuid, e.kc_no as e_kc_no, e.material_id as e_material_id, e.unit_price as e_unit_price, e.price as e_price, e.qty as e_qty, e.batch_no as e_batch_no, e.batch_number as e_batch_number, e.orig_batch_id as e_orig_batch_id, e.orig_batch_no_snapshot as e_orig_batch_no_snap, e.begin_time as e_begin_time, e.end_time as e_end_time, e.stock_qty as e_stock_qty, e.profit_qty as e_profit_qty, e.stock_amount as e_stock_amount, e.profit_amount as e_profit_amount, e.supplier_id as e_supplier_id, e.main_barcode as e_main_barcode, e.sub_barcode as e_sub_barcode, e.return_warehouse_id as e_return_warehouse_id, m.id as em_id, m.code as em_code, m.name as em_name from stk_io_stocktaking_entry e left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id where e.paren_id = #{stocktakingId} and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) and ( (e.profit_qty is not null and e.profit_qty != 0) or (e.profit_amount is not null and e.profit_amount != 0) )
select max(bill_no) from stk_io_profit_loss where bill_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select count(1) from stk_io_profit_loss where stocktaking_id = #{stocktakingId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag is null or del_flag != 1)
mapper.update: update stk_io_profit_loss_entry set batch_no = #{batchNo}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update stk_io_profit_loss_entry set batch_no = #{batchNo}, surplus_stk_batch_id = #{surplusStkBatchId}, result_stk_inventory_id = #{resultStkInventoryId}, result_dep_inventory_id = #{resultDepInventoryId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.select:
select COALESCE(SUM(e.profit_qty), 0) as totalQty, COALESCE(SUM(e.profit_amount), 0) as totalAmt from stk_io_profit_loss_entry e left join stk_io_profit_loss p on e.paren_id = p.id
(e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag != 1) and (p.del_flag is null or p.del_flag != 1) and p.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and p.bill_no like concat('%', #{billNo}, '%') and p.stocktaking_no like concat('%', #{stocktakingNo}, '%') and p.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and exists (select 1 from stk_io_profit_loss_entry e2 left join fd_material m2 on e2.material_id = m2.id where e2.paren_id = p.id and (m2.name like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%') or m2.code like concat('%', #{materialName}, '%'))) and DATE(p.create_time) >= #{beginDate} and DATE(p.create_time) <= #{endDate}
